body_txt: A variety of two-person ensemble where one person has technical or artistic expertise but lacks social and commercial skills to advertise them, while the other, though lacking geeky know-how, has a silver tongue and a keen profit sense . They often bicker a lot (especially about the Doer's habit of " Doing It for the Art ") but grudgingly acknowledge needing each other. Less optimistically, the Talker may be a Corrupt Corporate Executive taking advantage of the Doer's naivete , lack of attention to anything but their work, or legal ignorance in order to get away with abusing their inventions note obviously this only applies to doers who are inventors , taking more than their fair share of the profits, or Stealing the Credit for the Doer's creations. An even more hostile relationship may involve Forced Creativity , Kidnapping , An Offer You Can't Refuse , or a Leonine Contract . As most creators are creators , the creatives are less likely to be evil, but a Mad Scientist may be using the company as a front for some evil scheme, and it's also possible for a said scientist to team up with a Villain with Good Publicity to run Evil, Inc. . A Reclusive Artist will often benefit from this relationship. See also Odd Couple and Odd Friendship . Compare Red Oni, Blue Oni and Aloof Leader, Affable Subordinate .
